apiIntroAfter: Returns a PNG QR-code data URL (data.zelfQR) plus the usual ZelfProof and IPFS metadata.
heroSubtitle: Generate a portable QR-coded HumanID from a face and identity data.
publicDataHint: Shown with the proof; all values are sent as strings.
metadataHint: Internal metadata; same string-value rules as public data.
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Either option works for this step.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and align your face in the frame
uploadSubtitle: Select an image file from your device instead
resultSuccessDescription: PNG QR, ZelfProof, IPFS details, and usage below.
errorPublicDataJson: Public data: fix the JSON (invalid or incomplete), then try again.
errorMetadataJson: Metadata: fix the JSON (invalid or incomplete), then try again.
errorKeysRequired: Public data and metadata need at least one key with a non-empty key name.
